ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: OR( BEGINS(Product2.ProductCode, "DNU-"), BEGINS(Product2.ProductCode, "NFS-"), BEGINS(Product2.Name, "DNU"), BEGINS(Product2.Name, "NFS"), BEGINS(Product2.Name, "Legacy") )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Product marked as DNU, NFS, or Legacy. Please select a different product.
